title: International holiday list for "Workday" funtion
excerpt: With Excel (and Google Sheets) there is an ability to add a list of dates that are holidays (Excel uses “workday.intl” as a reference file.    We have clients all over the world and they have different “workday” calendar…

posts.author: bpchristensen (Brent Christensen)
posts.cookedHtml:
With Excel (and Google Sheets) there is an ability to add a list of dates that are holidays (Excel uses “workday.intl” as a reference file. We have clients all over the world and they have different “workday” calendars.

Is there a way to provide such a list to the “workday” formula in Monday.com?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @bpchristensen

We have solved this by implementing WorkDays Calculator in Make - integrating with Monday Board.

Features:

  1. Add/Subtract Days
  2. Input number of days
  3. Input customized holiday list

image1296×883 85.5 KB

If you are new to Make, signup using below link:
https://www.make.com/en/register?pc=msquare

To implement the workdays calculator in 30 mins, reach out to us @ Calendly - Msquare
